case_title: PERSOLVE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA, VS. EMILY DELGADO AKA EMILY J GONZALEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA, ACCOUNT RESOLUTION ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMILY DELGADO AKA EMILY J GONZALEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL $2,342.96 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $743.33 INTEREST, $310.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,916.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
